T036_groq_cap_validation.description: Added sanitizeEffectCap() pure function + LLM_EFFECT_CAPS constants. Applied to all 3 options after LLM parse. Clamps HEAL_LIFE<=7, DAMAGE_LIFE<=5, ADD_REPUTATION<=-10/+10, ADD_ANAM<=10, ADD_BIOME_CURRENCY<=10. Handles both CODE:N and CODE:faction:N formats. Unknown codes pass through unchanged.
T036_groq_cap_validation.integration_point: GroqAdapter.generateCard() after JSON.parse validation, before Card construction

T037_llm_loading_hint.description: Added showLLMLoadingHint() / hideLLMLoadingHint() functions. Hint is a fixed-position pill at bottom-center (z-index:60) showing 'Merlin consulte les etoiles...' during Groq generation. Shown before generateCard() await, hidden on success, null return, and catch paths. pointer-events:none, DOM removed on hide (no leak).

code_review.medium_note: Double cast (unknown as readonly tuple) acceptable given upstream length===3 guard
code_review.low_note: parts.length===0 guard after split() is dead code but harmless
